Container.Name: twitch-miner-webredeem
Container.Overview: Public redeem website for the Twitch Miner Manager: visitors log in with a website user (created in the manager UI, page "Webseite-Einloesen") and trigger channel-point redemptions by click. This is the ONLY container meant to face the internet (e.g. via a Cloudflare Tunnel) — it proxies a handful of API calls to the manager and keeps the shared token server-side. Setup guide: WEBREDEEM.md in the repository.

Config.Name: Website Port
Config.Description: Host port for the public website. Point your reverse proxy / Cloudflare Tunnel here.

Config.Name: MANAGER_URL
Config.Description: Base URL where THIS container reaches the twitch-miner-manager container, e.g. http://UNRAID-IP:8000 (or http://twitch-miner-manager:8000 on a shared custom Docker network). Must NOT be internet-reachable.

Config.Name: REDEEM_TOKEN
Config.Description: Shared secret from the manager UI: page 'Webseite-Einloesen' -> 'Token anzeigen' (or the file webredeem_token in the manager's /data).

Config.Name: TRUST_PROXY
Config.Description: Use the X-Forwarded-For header for the client IP (leave true behind Cloudflare Tunnel or any reverse proxy; set false when exposed directly).
